dict.string: You Beat Foul Owl. He'll be back stronger than before!
You Beat Dr. Groundhog. He'll be back stronger than before!
You Beat Loco Locust. He'll be back stronger than before!
You Beat Skunkarella. She'll be back stronger than before!
You Beat Rocky Rhino. He'll be back stronger than before!
You Beat General Larvaelus. He'll be back stronger than before!
You Beat Mystical Mamba. He'll be back stronger than before!
You Beat Bully Frog. He'll be back stronger than before!
